overview.description: The Voya Core Bond ETF (VCOB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund seeks total returns using an active management approach to investing in a diversified portfolio of investment grade securities, globally. The fund aims to outperform core bond indexes based on a proprietary research and investment process. VCOB was launched on Nov 18, 2025 and is issued by Voya.
